# Homework 1 {.centered-title}
<!-- We expect Homework to be placed in the Appendix. To parse properly via auto-numbering.lua, assignments MUST be at heading level 1 (#), use the .centered-title class, and have a title of the form "Homework n" -->

::: {.content-hidden}
{{< include ../_macros.qmd >}}
:::

{{< include _homework-header.qmd >}}

::: {#exr-rational-point-on-sphere} 
In classical geometry, we often parameterize curves using basic arithmetic. Use @exr-hypotenuse-calculation to determine a rational point on the Euclidean circle (a "1-face")
$$
    \Tb \coloneqq \{ (x,y) \in \Ab^2 \mid x^2 + y^2 = 1 \}.
$$
:::

*Note*: Next week, we will see why this parameterization fails when $\Tb$ is replaced by the boundary of a 2-dimensional hypersquare!
